provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Livestock and Meat Industries Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: any premises approved and licensed in which animals or poultry are slaughtered, and includes any place available in connection with those premises for the confinement of animals or poultry awaiting slaughter in those premises
a bull, ox, steer, cow, heifer or calf
any premises, cutting premises, or a game processing or handling facility, used for the storage under temperature controlled conditions of fresh meat intended for sale for human consumption
premises under temperature controlled conditions used for the purpose of cutting up fresh meat intended for human consumption
